assets.mechanism: Extended half-life GLP-1 receptor agonism with monthly subcutaneous dosing
assets.stageRaw: Phase III China; Phase III completion: 2027Q2; FDA communication ongoing
assets.description: Monthly GLP-1 receptor agonist candidate for overweight or obesity.
assets.notes: HKEX filing pipeline chart lists Zovaglutide (ZT002), target GLP-1, QM injection, obesity, Phase III China. PRNewswire EASD 2025 release supports Phase 2 obesity data and monthly dosing.

assets.differentiator: Same monthly GLP-1 platform as obesity program
assets.description: Zovaglutide development candidate for type 2 diabetes.
assets.notes: Pipeline chart text extraction is ambiguous around T2D stage placement; normalized conservatively to Phase 1 while preserving raw Phase Id/IIa text.

assets.differentiator: Oral GLP-1 program with QD/QW dosing described in pipeline chart
assets.notes: HKEX chart lists ZT006 as QD/QW oral GLP-1 peptide for obesity with Phase II completion expected 2026Q4. Dosing interval normalized to Daily requires QA because source shows QD/QW.
Source lists MASH/SHTG; SHTG is mapped to Other pending vocabulary expansion.

extractionNotes: Small 01 screening pass limited to QL Biopharm.
Primary source used was HKEX filing pipeline chart; PRNewswire EASD 2025 release used as supporting evidence for zovaglutide obesity data.
Several QL pipeline rows are difficult to parse from PDF text extraction and should receive QA review before approval.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm exact normalized stage for ZT002 T2D from original chart layout.
Confirm whether ZT006 dosage interval should be stored as Daily, Weekly, or both in the app schema.
Confirm preferred indication vocabulary for SHTG.
